2188190.name: RPGScenery - City Streets
2188190.description:
After crossing the portal, you will find yourself in a small square from where a stone bridge leads into the city. This tiny town would be no different from any other if it wasn't built on the massive stone hands of a mile-high statue. But it was built there, or at least got there somehow. Looking down from the bridge, a dizzying depth opens before your eyes, giving your legs a slight tremor.
Suddenly, countless questions about the city pop into your head, and the answers await you just a few steps away...

This DLC contains 5 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
